<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/validator_operator/validator_onboarding.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-validator-operator-validator-onboarding-parsed-literal-95" location="lines:95-100" -->
```bash
(set -o pipefail
CURL='curl -fsS -m 5 --connect-timeout 5'
for url in $($CURL |gsf_scan_url|/api/scan/v0/scans | jq -r '.scans[].scans[].publicUrl'); do
  echo -n "$url: "
  $CURL "$url"/api/scan/version | jq -r '.version'
done)
```
